profiles.genre: AI futurist and business keynote speaker
profiles.short_bio: Zack Kass is a global AI advisor and former Head of Go-To-Market at OpenAI. He is recognized as one of BigSpeak’s most-booked speakers and a leading keynote voice on practical AI strategy for business audiences.
profiles.long_bio:
Zack Kass is an American AI futurist and business keynote speaker known for translating emerging AI capabilities into practical business strategy. He previously served as Head of Go-To-Market at OpenAI and now advises organizations on AI adoption and leadership decisions.

His market demand is well documented: BigSpeak says he was their most-booked speaker for the second year in a row and was booked over 150 times in 2025. BigSpeak also lists him among its top business speakers of 2026, underscoring strong interest from corporate and conference buyers.

Kass is appearing on major 2026 event programs, including Scale Computing Platform 2026 as a keynote headliner and APEX EXPO 2026 as a keynote speaker. That visibility reflects the broader demand for speakers who can address AI strategy, business impact, and leadership implications.

For event organizers building programs around innovation, transformation, and executive decision-making, Zack Kass is positioned as a high-interest speaker in the AI category. His background and current booking momentum make him a relevant choice for conferences, summits, and leadership gatherings focused on applied AI.

profiles.genre: leadership, change management, and operations keynote
profiles.short_bio: Chet Hirani is a British TEDx speaker and the author of Burn the Rules: Lead from Within. He brings more than 20 years of corporate experience, including work in high-pressure retail and logistics environments.
profiles.long_bio:
Chet Hirani is a British speaker positioned in leadership, change management, and operations keynote settings. His profile is built around practical business themes for audiences navigating uncertainty and change.

He is a TEDx speaker and the author of Burn the Rules: Lead from Within. Those credentials support a message focused on leadership from within and actionable thinking for modern workplaces.

Hirani brings more than 20 years of corporate experience. His background includes high-pressure retail and logistics environments, which strengthens his relevance for operationally intense teams and leaders.

His keynote is positioned for leaders facing uncertainty and change, making him a strong editorial fit for organizations looking for practical perspectives on performance, adaptation, and leadership under pressure.
